subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of God and my companions! When the morn of guidance, through the outpourings of Glory, cast its radiance upon the horizons [3.5s]... ...Make every effort to acquire the advanced knowledge of the day, and strain every nerve to carry forward the divine civilization. Establish schools that are well organized
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان الهی و یاران من صبح هدی چون از فیوضات بها پرتو بر آفاق انداخت نور
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @unity in diversity, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Hands of the Cause
